aboutHeading: Committed to quality healthcare and accurate diagnostics.
aboutDescription: Banerjee Diagnostic Foundation and Hospaccx is a modern multispecialty diagnostic and healthcare center dedicated to providing reliable medical services with accuracy, compassion, and professionalism.
aboutParagraphTwo: Located in Sainthia, Birbhum, our center offers specialist consultations, advanced diagnostic imaging, pathology services, and patient care support in a safe and comfortable environment.
aboutParagraphThree: We believe early diagnosis, expert medical advice, and patient trust are the foundation of better healthcare. Our mission is to deliver trusted, accessible, and high-quality healthcare services that improve community well-being.
